name: openclaw-multi-agent
description: Multi-agent orchestration plugin for OpenClaw — 3 specialized agents with routing, A2A tools, and CLI management

scripts.test: node --input-type=module -e "import('./src/index.js').then(() => console.log('✅ Plugin loads OK')).catch(e => { console.error('❌', e); process.exit(1); })"
